landing.description: Universal, camera-agnostic platform that transforms any CCTV network into a predictive crowd safety system. Real-time detection, forecasting, and risk analysis.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for real CCTV environments with resilience, fallback, and scalability.
landing.feature1Desc: Works with any USB, IP, RTSP, or mobile camera. Zero vendor lock-in.
landing.feature2Desc: YOLOv8-powered people counting at 1 FPS with CPU-optimized inference.
landing.feature3Desc: LSTM/TCN models predict crowd levels 15, 30, and 60 minutes ahead.
landing.feature4Desc: Multi-factor risk engine using density, growth rate, weather, and events.
landing.feature5Desc: WebSocket-powered alerts via dashboard, email, SMS, and push notifications.
landing.feature6Desc: CSV fallbacks, circuit breakers, and auto-reconnect. System never dies.
landing.archSubtitle: End-to-end pipeline from camera feed to actionable intelligence.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Connect your cameras and start monitoring in minutes.
